criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence for features like personalized recommendations, chatbots, and visual search.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, developer information.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: Overall user satisfaction with the app's interface, ease of use, and performance.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: Range and usefulness of features offered by the app, including AI-powered functionalities.

criteria.name: Popularity
criteria.description: Number of downloads and active users.

criteria.name: Customer Support
criteria.description: Quality and responsiveness of customer support services.
